essence: Bold WA home-building brokerage. Private access to a curated panel of builders. White space, deep forest, one spring-green signal.
styleReference: King Kong-style bold editorial — giant black caps, white space, one electric green

mist.role: faint green tint — quiet fills, image backplates

signal.role: spring-green action colour — CTAs, badges, the one emphasis word (10%). Used as TEXT for emphasis, not a block.

display.use: headlines, names, prices — ALL CAPS, tight tracking -0.045em

body.use: all body copy, UI — sentence case

serif.use: rare editorial whisper — pulled quotes, under 2%

logo.concept: Line-art house with an electrical plug inside; the cord forms the bottom-right edge. Home + connection.

wordmark.tagline: Your panel of WA's best builders, behind one private door.

guardrails: Never show rep commission, internal margin, or prestart credit on client-facing surfaces.
Signal green is the only accent — used as TEXT for emphasis (not a block) and on the action. Scarce. No lime, no gold.
Display is ALL CAPS Inter Tight 900; body stays sentence case.
No em-dashes, no semicolons, no AI-slop flourishes. Australian spelling for client copy.
